name: @vanillagreen/pi-agents-zellij
description: Pi extension for delegating work to project or user agents, including persistent zellij agent panes.

settings.label: Enable agents
settings.description: Register the agent tool, /agents command, and persistent pane polling.

settings.label: Glyph style
settings.description: Glyphs for vstack-owned UI chrome. Unicode is the default; ASCII uses plain box/status/separator characters for terminal compatibility. pi-tool-renderer's global override wins when set.

settings.label: Max concurrency
settings.description: Maximum number of one-shot/background agent executions running concurrently in the parallel dispatch queue. Persistent pane agents occupy a worker only until launch/enqueue; they are not long-running bg workers after that.

settings.label: Background task timeout (ms)
settings.description: Maximum runtime for one-shot/background child processes before they are marked unresponsive, failed, and terminated. Use 0 to disable.

settings.label: Reused session budget threshold
settings.description: Refuse or warn before launching an explicit bg sessionKey when the saved session estimate exceeds this fraction of model context.

settings.label: Reused session budget policy
settings.description: Behavior when an explicit bg sessionKey is near context limit. refuse-and-warn blocks launch with a warning; warn allows launch with a warning; compact-then-resume archives/truncates the lane before launch.

settings.label: Reused session context limit tokens
settings.description: Model context limit used by the reused-session file-size heuristic.

settings.label: Show agent dashboard
settings.description: Render a persistent agent activity card above the editor with active/completed agents, bridge state, recent activity, and usage. After the user hides it, lifecycle updates do not reopen it until an explicit toggle/show.

settings.label: Quiet inline output with dashboard
settings.description: When the dashboard is enabled, keep chat/tool transcript rows to short event crumbs, skip single bg launch previews, and move details into the dashboard/ctrl+o views.

settings.label: Dashboard max items
settings.description: Maximum agent rows shown in the persistent dashboard.

settings.label: Dashboard collapsed by default
settings.description: Show fewer dashboard rows and hide summaries by default.

settings.label: Animate spinners
settings.description: Animate running-agent spinner frames. Disable to show a static gear icon instead. Can reduce terminal flickering.

settings.label: Dashboard display shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that cycles the agent dashboard through compact → normal → expanded → hidden, then restores the last visible mode. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Agents popup shortcut
settings.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the full /agents agent browser popup. Use none to disable.

settings.label: Legacy tree connector style
settings.description: Legacy fallback for tree connectors when glyphStyle is unset and pi-tool-renderer globalGlyphStyleOverride is inherit. Prefer Glyph style for all UI chrome.

settings.label: Collapsed item count
settings.description: Number of recent text/tool items shown in collapsed agent results.

settings.label: Truncate agent results
settings.description: Apply Pi-sized inline caps to agent tool output and details, with full-output preservation when enabled.

settings.label: Result max bytes
settings.description: Maximum inline bytes kept for each agent result before truncation.

settings.label: Result max lines
settings.description: Maximum inline lines kept for each agent result before truncation.

settings.label: Preserve full agent output
settings.description: Write oversized full agent output to the session runtime and include the artifact path in tool results.

settings.label: Completion poll interval
settings.description: Parent-session polling interval for persistent pane completion files.

settings.label: Child inbox poll interval
settings.description: Child-pane polling interval for incoming persistent pane task files.

settings.label: Force session bridge for panes
settings.description: Explicitly load pi-session-bridge in new persistent pane launchers so steer_subagent can target panes even when settings drift.

settings.label: Open panes stacked
settings.description: Launch persistent Zellij child panes with `zellij action new-pane --stacked`. Disable to use a normal downward split.

settings.label: Subagent model source
settings.description: Choose whether child agents use the model from agent frontmatter or inherit the parent session model.

settings.label: Subagent thinking source
settings.description: Choose whether child agents use the thinking level encoded in the agent model (model :effort suffix) or inherit the parent session thinking level.

resources.name: subagent
resources.description: Delegate tasks to isolated Pi agents. Bg calls use fresh one-shot sessions unless sessionKey is explicit; unknown agent names are rejected with available inventory; parallel calls run through a flat worker pool capped at maxConcurrency.

resources.name: delegate_subagent
resources.description: Restricted exploratory delegation for child agents. Single-mode only; targets must appear in the caller agent's allowed-subagents frontmatter (engineer agents default to ['scout']). Pane targets and session reuse are rejected.

resources.name: get_subagent_result
resources.description: Retrieve persistent pane agent task results by taskId or latest agent task; can also wait for pane idle.

resources.name: wait_for_subagent_idle
resources.description: Wait for a persistent pane agent to transition to pi-bridge isIdle=true.

resources.name: steer_subagent
resources.description: Steer a live persistent pane agent through pi-session-bridge or queue a fallback steering note.

resources.name: stop_subagent
resources.description: Stop a persistent pane agent, kill its zellij pane, and preserve the saved pane session for later resume.

resources.name: /agents
resources.description: List, inspect, and manage agent panes.

author: vanillagreen
